name: detectors-enumerated
description: SKILL.md must define five detectors D1-D5

name: modes-cron-vs-interactive
description: Cron mode must NOT auto-chain to /slice; interactive mode MUST
expected_in_skill: Skip this phase if `mode: cron` or `mode: dry-run`

name: judge-must-be-opus
description: Phase C judge MUST use opus, not sonnet (user mandate 2026-04-26)

name: vault-lint-differentiation
description: Skill must NOT duplicate /vault-lint's mechanical hygiene job

name: improve-differentiation
description: Skill must NOT duplicate per-skill /improve's job

name: quota-cap-on-judge-calls
description: Phase C must cap total Agent calls per run (125 = 5 detectors × 25 candidates)
expected_in_skill: cap total Agent calls per run at 125

name: checkpointing-for-resumability
description: Skill must write a per-phase checkpoint so interrupted runs can resume
expected_in_skill: Resumes from the last completed phase
Deletes the checkpoint after Phase F

name: slice-integration-via-report
description: Phase E must invoke /slice with the report path, not bypass it
expected_in_skill: treats the `## Proposed Issues` table as its slice breakdown

name: report-only-by-design
description: Skill must never auto-apply refactors; report is the deliverable
expected_in_skill: this skill stops at the report

name: exempt-frontmatter-honored
description: Files marked `architecture-exempt: true` must be skipped in Phase A
expected_in_skill: Record the exemption in the report
